chunks.content:
Article: Eva Quotes Quiz
[]: Eva Quotes Quiz             Quote Post by ShinjiIkari » Sun Feb 20, 2011 8:50 pm A little quote quiz for you... Please match the quote with the episode number for one point and add an additional point for the "Name" of the episode... Halfway through I decided to remove the names of the characters that said them. Get that name too and its another point! (Note- English dub, not sub.) (Note: New movies not included) (Hint: EOE is included but remember the "form" of EOE) 1.)"It's hot." 2.)"Acts of men are better than acts of God!" 3.)"You disappoint me." 4.)"Ikari would chew my ass off!" 5.)"You're just a child yourself." 6.)"You embarrass me" 7.)"I'd rather be burned by the heat of my passion for you." 8.)"Momma, have you been there all along?" 9.)"The time has come, let's go." 10.)"I wanted to see them all, one last time" 11.)"Under these cirumstances the pilot's life is irrelavent." 12.)"Am I so worthless you couldn't do this for me?" 13.)Then you can just stay in bed." 14.)"How far down are we going?" 15.)"Hey no offense taken." 5 Point bonus!!! 50 points max with all right answers. Finish this prayer of SEELE "Bring forth the true form of the Eva Series," Some of you may think this is pretty easy but it's just for fun! :-) SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Rei Makes You Go Splat » Sun Feb 20, 2011 10:13 pm 1.)"It's hot." - Fuyutsuki, Episode 11 "The Day Tokyo-3 Stood Still" 3.)"You disappoint me." - Gendo, Episode 19 "Introjection" 5.)"You're just a child yourself." - Shinji, Episode 9 "Both of You, Dance Like You Want to Win!" 7.)"I'd rather be burned by the heat of my passion for you." - Kaji, Episode 15 "Those Women Who Longed for the Touch of Others' Lips, and Thus Invited their kisses

[]:             Quote Post by ShinjiIkari » Mon Feb 21, 2011 8:56 am Agreed... I pulled these quotes from Platinum Complete Thinpack... These are all pretty basic quotes, though. Not sure there would be too much variance as far as translation. I picked these quotes on purpose for that reason. You could also think of this as a scavenger hunt! (I always find an excuse to watch the series again) Happy hunting!!!
